hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == */.env* || "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == */.env ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env files must not be edited by Claude — edit manually to avoid accidental credential exposure'; exit 2; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then uvx ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && uvx ruff check --fix --silent "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.ts ]]; then cd /Users/bibektimilsina/projects/fuse_new && pnpm --filter web exec eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; true
